entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: The genus Arachis, specifically Arachis hypogaea L. cv. ‘NC 6’, used in the study.

entities.name: INTERSPECIFIC HYBRIDIZATION
entities.description: The process of crossing different species within the Arachis genus.

entities.name: EMBRYO ABORTION
entities.description: The early failure of embryo development that restricts interspecific hybridization in Arachis.

entities.name: EMBRYO RESCUE
entities.description: The technique of recovering young embryos in vitro to prevent abortion.

entities.name: IN VITRO CULTURE
entities.description: The growth of tissues, such as peg tips and ovules, in a controlled artificial environment.

entities.name: PEG TIPS
entities.description: The tissue containing ovules and embryos in Arachis hypogaea.

entities.name: OVULE GROWTH
entities.description: The development and growth of the ovule in vitro.

entities.name: CALLUS PRODUCTION
entities.description: The formation of an unorganized mass of cells from cultured tissues.

entities.name: PEG ELONGATION
entities.description: The growth in length of the peg tissues.

entities.name: SELF-POLLINATION
entities.description: The fertilization of a plant by its own pollen.

entities.name: KINETIN
entities.description: A cytokinin used in culture media to stimulate callus production.

entities.name: SUCROSE
entities.description: A sugar used in culture media to promote peg elongation.
